Values.value: publishIssueAward service in progress for %issueAwardsDoc/entityNo% for challengeId %issueAwardsDoc/challengeId%

MAP.COMMENT: divide actual value by target value
map period event details to issueAward doc
get the connection details from config

INVOKE.COMMENT: convert issueAward doc to json string

Values.value: JMS message populated for publishing award
